_comment: urOMT model/algorithm settings. Data settings (scans, mask, voxel spacing, domain size) are read directly from planC and are NOT stored here. Mirrors cfg fields (b) from the MATLAB getParams.m.

_field_doc.sigma: diffusion coefficient (Gaussian bandwidth) in the advection-diffusion PDE
_field_doc.dt: time-step size for the inner numerical integration
_field_doc.nt: number of inner time sub-steps between two consecutive image frames
_field_doc.beta: weight on the final-image fidelity term (Gamma3)
_field_doc.eta: weight on the velocity H1-smoothness penalty (Gamma4 = eta*hd*dt*sum|grad u|^2); pulls neighbouring velocity vectors toward the same direction by regularizing the objective's velocity null space (raw urOMT velocity is unconstrained where density is low/flat). 0=off (original objective). Default 1000 lifts neighbour-vector direction coherence from ~0.32 to ~0.87 on the brain uptake data without degrading (in fact improving) the density fit Gamma3; increase toward smoother fields, decrease to retain finer velocity structure
_field_doc.niter_pcg: max iterations for the (P)CG Hessian/diffusion solves
_field_doc.maxUiter: outer optimization iterations per time interval (for solver='gn' this is the number of Gauss-Newton steps; few iterations act as early-stopping regularization, as in the MATLAB)
_field_doc.solver: 'gn' = exact Gauss-Newton block (matrix-free GN Hessian 2*beta*hd*J'J + regularization via the final-density sensitivities + CG + backtracking line search; this is the same GN Hessian as MATLAB GNblock_ur); 'lbfgs' = scipy L-BFGS-B on the adjoint gradient (first-pass)
_field_doc.gnLambda0: initial Levenberg-Marquardt damping for solver='gn', relative to the misfit Hessian scale 2*beta*hd; adaptively reduced toward pure Gauss-Newton on success and raised on failure. Smaller -> closer to MATLAB's undamped exact GN (less stable); 0 -> pure GN relying only on the kinetic regularization
_field_doc.reinitR: 0=initialize each interval with the previous evolved density (consecutive); 1=reset to the measured frame
_field_doc.smooth: number of smoothing iterations/steps applied to each frame (0=off)
_field_doc.smooth_method: 'affine' (affine-invariant mean-curvature flow, MATLAB affine_diffusion_3d), 'linear' (heat flow), or 'gaussian' (scipy stand-in)
_field_doc.smooth_dt: evolution step size for the affine/linear smoothing flow
_field_doc.convertToConc: 1=concentration ('CC') normalization, 0=raw signal (used only when 'normMethod' is null)
_field_doc.normMethod: signal normalization for Part 1: 'CC' (contrast concentration, needs TR/FA), 'RSE' (relative signal enhancement S(t)/S0), 'none' (raw); null=derive from convertToConc
_field_doc.rhoScale: global rescale of the normalized density (urOMT velocity is scale-invariant, so this only conditions the solver): null/0=off, 'auto'=make the first-frame ROI mean 1 (useful for tiny CC concentrations), or a numeric multiplier
_field_doc.bbox_pad: pad the ROI bounding box by this many voxels per in-plane side (matches the MATLAB getRange; 0=tight box)
_field_doc.bbox_full_z: 1=use the full z-extent of the scan for the ROI box instead of the mask's z-range (matches MATLAB getRange)
_field_doc.T10: pre-contrast longitudinal relaxation time (seconds) for concentration conversion (default 1/0.6)
_field_doc.basePts: number of leading SELECTED frames consumed in-sequence as the pre-contrast baseline S(0) (only when baselineFrames=0 and the window starts at frame 1)
_field_doc.baselineFrames: external pre-contrast baseline: S(0)=mean of the first N temporally-ordered scans, NOT consumed (the whole selected window is transported). 1=use the 1st timepoint. Matches the MATLAB workflow; >0 overrides the in-sequence basePts consumption
_field_doc.TR: repetition time override in SECONDS; null=read scanInfo.repetitionTime (DICOM milliseconds, converted to seconds automatically)
_field_doc.FA: flip angle (degrees) override for concentration conversion; null=read from scan metadata (scanInfo.flipAngle)
_field_doc.conc_clip: optional [min,max] clip applied to the normalized signal (S(t)/S(0)) before concentration conversion; null=no clip
_field_doc.chiStructNum: structure index for the source-indicator chi (MATLAB K); null=K=1 everywhere (source r may act anywhere in the ROI)
_field_doc.time: 1-based selection into the supplied scan list: first_time:time_jump:last_time (last_time=null -> last scan)
